message.content:
@startuml
actor Client
actor Device

Client -> Device: Lx::Protocol::Device::GetService
note right of Client
  Send UDP broadcast to port 56700
  tagged = 1
end note

Device -> Client: Lx::Protocol::Device::StateService
note left of Client
  Register device service and port
  Future messages can be unicast datagrams
end note

Client -> Device: Lx::Protocol::Device::SetLabel
note right of Client
  source = <unique 32bit id>
  ack_required = true
  sequence = <wrap around sequence>
end note

Device -> Client: Lx::Protocol::Device::Acknowlegement
note right of Device
  source = <unique 32bit id from request>
  sequence = <sequence number from request>
end note
@enduml
